_comment: Cursor review-subagent gate. Rust-backed via router-rs (`cursor hook --event=...`). Python implementation moved to .cursor/hooks/legacy/ as break-glass fallback. State machine details: see scripts/router-rs/src/cursor_hooks.rs.

beforeSubmitPrompt.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=beforeSubmitPrompt --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

subagentStart.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=subagentStart --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

subagentStop.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=subagentStop --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

postToolUse.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=postToolUse --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

afterAgentResponse.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=afterAgentResponse --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

preCompact.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=preCompact --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

sessionEnd.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=sessionEnd --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'

stop.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT="${CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" cursor hook --event=stop --repo-root "$CURSOR_PROJECT_ROOT"'
